description: Left: tradeline selection and dispute options. Right: live letter preview updating as user makes choices. Side-by-side for efficiency.

css_layout_rules..wizard-left: display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 2rem; overflow-y: auto; border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
css_layout_rules..wizard-right: display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 2rem; overflow-y: auto; background: var(--surface-alt);
css_layout_rules..letter-preview-body: flex: 1; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.7; white-space: pre-wrap; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 2rem;
